prestazioni: AM29 5.2L V12 (AE31) twin-turbo conversion using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with billet compressor wheels, custom 42mm wastegates, and a bespoke Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate setup, paired with a Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU running custom fuel and ignition maps for 900+ hp on E85

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapovič with 3.5-inch diameter piping, quad 100mm carbon-fiber tips, and a valved X-pipe crossover for optimized backpressure and sound tuning, featuring a secondary bypass valve for track-only mode

Ohlins TTX46 coilovers with 2-way adjustable compression and rebound damping, custom valved for the DBS's aluminum-intensive chassis, paired with Eibach ERS 1400N/mm helper springs and spherical bearing top mounts by SuperPro for subframe reinforcement
estetica: RML Group GT3-inspired widebody conversion kit with carbon-fiber front fenders (extended 50mm), rear quarter panels (extended 70mm), and a custom 3D-printed aluminum rear diffuser with integrated Gurney flap, all finished in Aston Martin Q by R-Reforged satin silver

Vorsteiner V-FF1077 forged carbon-fiber front splitter with adjustable dive planes and a rear wing based on the Aston Martin Valkyrie's active aero design, modified with a 1,200mm span and 300mm chord, featuring a 3-position hydraulic adjustment system by Dymag

Full interior retrim by Saddleback Leather using Bridge of Weir Nappa leather with Alcantara headliner, custom carbon-fiber door cards with integrated 3D-printed air vents, and a bespoke digital dash by AIM MXS Strada with a 12-inch display running Race Studio 3 for telemetry logging
